MALTA FINANCIAL SERVICES AUTHORITY ACT
(DIGITAL OPERATIONAL RESILIENCE ACT (DORA))

[ L.S.330.20

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 330.20
REGOLAMENTI DWAR MALTA FINANCIAL
SERVICES AUTHORITY ACT (DIGITAL
OPERATIONAL RESILIENCE ACT (DORA))
17 ta’ Jannar, 2025

L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 166 tal-2024.

Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
